_comment: §6 me seed — the signed-in test user (web/src/mocks/seed.ts acc-kiki): non-designer, Lagos, follows amara+bisi (tunde is the suggested designer), and carries real engagement history (seedLikes/seedSaves verbatim) so action rows reflect a lived-in account, not a fresh one. The profile/settings wave adds the account-domain fields (email/bio/prefs/consent — web Account entity parity; the bio and the 7 per-event notification prefs follow the ratified B7-mobile canvas, 207:2). accepted_days_ago mirrors the web seed's daysAgo(40) consent stamps.
